2605.30058.title: HEART-Bench: Do LLM Agents Exhibit Human-like Psychology?
2605.30058.paper_summary: While LLM agents have demonstrated remarkable task-oriented abilities such as planning, reasoning, and action, few works have treated them as complete human personalities where emotional dimensions hold equal importance. In this paper, we introduce a novel benchmark to systematically assess whether LLM agents can simulate coherent, human-like psychology. Specifically, our benchmark constructs 11 diverse human characters grounded in orthogonal Big Five personality traits, with each profile deeply integrated with 1,000 structured autobiographical-style episodic memories distributed across theory-grounded developmental life stages. To rigorously evaluate the psychological manifestations of LLMs, we designed a curated suite of 64 decision-making scenarios, guided by the DIAMONDS taxonomy, a psychological framework that characterizes situations along eight dimensions: Duty, Intellect, Adversity, Mating, pOsitivity, Negativity, Deception, and Sociality. By subjecting agents to varying scenarios, the benchmark evaluates whether they can consolidate their innate personality traits and autobiographical memories to make behavioral decisions that are consistent with their specific psychological profiles. After systematic human validation and filtering, we obtained a benchmark consisting of 673 multiple-choice questions (MCQs). We believe this benchmark provides a principled and scalable testbed for studying human-like emotions, personality consistency, and value-consistent behavioural decision-making in LLM-based agents.
2605.30058.paper_summary_zh: 雖然大型語言模型（LLM）代理已展示出卓越的任務導向能力，如計劃、推理和行動，但很少有研究將它們視為完整的人格，情感維度同樣重要。在本文中，我們介紹了一個新穎的基準，以系統性地評估LLM代理是否能夠模擬一致的人類心理。具體而言，我們的基準構建了11個多樣化的人物角色，這些角色基於正交的五大人格特質，每個角色的個人資料都深度整合了1,000個結構化的自傳式情節記憶，這些記憶分佈在理論基礎的發展生命階段中。為了嚴格評估LLM的心理表現，我們設計了一套精心策劃的64個決策場景，這些場景以DIAMONDS分類法為指導，這是一個心理學框架，沿著八個維度對情境進行特徵化：責任、智力、逆境、交配、正向、負向、欺騙和社交性。通過將代理置於不同的場景中，該基準評估它們是否能夠整合其固有的人格特質和自傳記憶，以做出與其特定心理特徵一致的行為決策。在系統的人類驗證和篩選後，我們獲得了一個包含673個多選題（MCQ）的基準。我們相信這個基準提供了一個原則性和可擴展的測試平台，用於研究基於LLM的代理的人類情感、人格一致性和價值一致的行為決策。
2605.30058.author: Weihan Peng et.al.
2605.30058.authors: Weihan Peng, Chenxu Zhang, Qianao Wang, Yuling Shi, Heng Lian, Qihong Mao, Jiahao Pang, Chunliang Feng, Bowen Li, Xiaodong Gu
